PredefinedFilterOption Properties

One Identity Manager API Server

The PredefinedFilterOption type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
ClauseProvider
DisplayName
FeatureNames
Returns the set of program features that grant access to this filter option.
GroupNames
Returns the set of permission groups that grant access to this filter option.
